I

IntSlice - Class in mavenprojjavalabs
IntSlice - контейнер, хранит тип int.
IntSlice() - Constructor for class mavenprojjavalabs.IntSlice
Create empty slice IntSlice() -> []
IntSlice(int) - Constructor for class mavenprojjavalabs.IntSlice
Create slice with concrete length, all elements are 0.
IntSlice(int...) - Constructor for class mavenprojjavalabs.IntSlice
Create slice from multiple values IntSlice(2,5,6,3,5,6) -> [2,5,6,3,5,6]
IntSlice(int, int) - Constructor for class mavenprojjavalabs.IntSlice
Create a slice with length and capacity.
